sales.description:
PUPIENUS, A.D. 238. AE Sestertius (18.04 gms), Rome Mint. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 4/5. Fine Style.
To view all items from the John P. Burnham Collection, click  here.
RIC-22A. Obverse: Laureate, draped, and cuirassed bust right; Reverse: Pax seated left on throne, holding branch and scepter. Impressively detailed and presenting far nicer than the assigned grade, this lovely Sestertius offers the chance to acquire a seldom seen and always popular ruler.

From the John P. Burnham Collect...
